targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, SUM(kwh_total) AS kwh FROM meter_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT detected_at, meter_id, kwh_actual, kwh_expected, severity FROM anomaly_events WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT m.cluster_id, SUM(md.kwh_total) AS kwh FROM meter_daily md JOIN meters m ON md.meter_id = m.meter_id WHERE md.bucket = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY m.cluster_id ORDER BY m.cluster_id
SELECT time, SUM(kwh) AS actual FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT time, SUM(kwh_pred) AS predicted FROM meter_predictions WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
